zh.lifeSummary: 當William Childe於1432年出生在英國武斯特斯爾諾維其可時，他的父親Edmund Childe21歲，母親Elizabeth17歲。他於大約1464年與Johannah Child在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1520年在他的家鄉享年88歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾諾維其可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Childe于1432年出生在英国武斯特斯爾諾維其可时，他的父亲Edmund Childe21岁，母亲Elizabeth17岁。他于大约1464年与Johannah Child在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1520年在他的家乡享年88岁，埋葬在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾諾維其可。

nameMeanings.name: Childe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Child
meanings: nickname from Middle English child ‘child, infant’ (Old English cild), in various possible applications. The word is found in Old English as a byname, and in Middle English as a widely used affectionate term of address. It was also used as a term of status for a young man of noble birth, although the exact meaning is not clear; in the 13th and 14th centuries it was a technical term used of a young noble awaiting elevation to the knighthood. In other cases it may have been applied as a byname to a youth considerably younger than his brothers or to one who was a minor on the death of his father.
in Kent, possibly a topographic name from Old English cielde ‘spring (water)’, a rare word derived from c(e)ald ‘cold’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Childe was born in 1432, in Northwick, Worcestershire, England, his father, Edmund Childe, was 21 and his mother, Elizabeth, was 17. He married Johannah Child about 1464, in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1520, in his hometown, at the age of 88, and was buried in Northwick, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Childe est né en 1432, à Northwick, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Edmund Childe, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Johannah Child environ 1464, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1520, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 88 ans, et a été enterré à Northwick, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Childe 1432 in Northwick, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edmund Childe 21 und seine Mutter Elizabeth 17. Er hat um 1464 in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Johannah Child geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1520 im Alter von 88 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Northwick, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Childe è nato il nel 1432 nel Northwick, Worcestershire, England, il suo padre, Edmund Childe, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Johannah Child circa 1464, nel Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1520, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 88 anni, e fu sepolto a Northwick, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Childeが1432年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアノースウィックで生まれた時，父Edmund Childeは21歳，母Elizabethは17歳であった。約1464年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアでJohannah Childと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1520年に故郷で88歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアノースウィックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Childe(이)가 1432년 영국 워스스터실르 노르스윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edmund Childe(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1464년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 Johannah Child(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1520년 그의 고향에서 88세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 노르스윅에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Childe nasceu em 1432, em Northwick, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edmund Childe, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Johannah Child aproximadamente 1464, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1520, em sua cidade natal, com 88 anos, e foi sepultado em Northwick, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Childe родился в 1432 г. в местности нортвикк, ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Edmund Childe было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Johannah Child около 1464 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1520 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 88 лет и был похоронен в местности нортвикк, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Childe nació en 1432, en Northwick, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Edmund Childe, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Elizabeth, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Johannah Child aproximadamente 1464, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1520, en su pueblo, a la edad de 88 años, y fue sepultado en Northwick, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
